notes.label: Field Note #01
notes.text: The first ferry often appears silently through the morning fog.

notes.label: Field Note #02
notes.text: Autumn crocus appears among old oyster shells near the beach.

notes.label: Field Note #03
notes.text: The dock grows quiet just before the last light leaves Active Pass.

notes.label: Field Note #04
notes.text: Historic Miners Bay works best at walking speed.
